defaults.style_notes: Dragon Quest XI-ish bright cel-shaded JRPG creature design, rounded expressive monster proportions, clean anime-inspired silhouette language, saturated heroic-fantasy colors, simple readable materials, soft toy-like sculptural forms, orthographic model-sheet lighting, animation-ready proportions, symmetrical anatomy, clear silhouette, full body visible, centered on a plain white background
defaults.negative_notes: no text, no labels, no watermark, no ground grid, no dramatic perspective, no cropped limbs, no extra characters, no duplicate animal, no action pose, no gritty realism, no horror design, no hyperreal fur

prompt_template: Create reference art for one symmetrical four-legged animal intended for Tripo3D mesh generation. Animal: {animal_description}. Equipment: {equipment_description}. View: {view_instruction}. Style target: {style_notes}. Constraints: neutral standing pose, legs visible and separated, head-tail body axis clear, left and right sides anatomically balanced, surface details simple enough for a clean low-poly mesh. Avoid: {negative_notes}.

views.front: front orthographic view, animal facing directly toward the camera
views.left: left side orthographic profile, animal facing toward the viewer's left
views.right: right side orthographic profile, animal facing toward the viewer's right
views.back: back orthographic view, animal facing directly away from the camera

mammal_quadruped_v1.label: Mammal quadruped
mammal_quadruped_v1.summary: General under-body limb rig for dog, cat, bear, otter, wolf, and similar fantasy mammals.
placement_notes: Shoulders and hips sit mostly above the paws.
Use for vertical or semi-vertical limb stance, not strongly side-splayed limbs.

ungulate_quadruped_v1.label: Ungulate quadruped
ungulate_quadruped_v1.summary: Long distal-limb rig for deer, horse, ram, goat, and hoofed fantasy creatures.
placement_notes: Preserve the long lower-leg/cannon/pastern chain even on stylized short creatures.
Hooves are terminal contact bones rather than broad paws.

sprawling_quadruped_v1.label: Sprawling quadruped
sprawling_quadruped_v1.summary: Side-splayed limb rig for lizards, salamanders, crocodile-like bodies, turtles, and shell reptiles.
placement_notes: Upper limb bones project laterally from the body before dropping toward the ground.
Use the same graph for shell reptiles; placement should account for limited shell deformation.

hopper_quadruped_v1.label: Hind-leg dominant
hopper_quadruped_v1.summary: Compact-front, powerful-rear rig for frogs, rabbits, and fantasy hoppers.
placement_notes: Rear chain is the primary locomotion chain and should not collapse to mammal-like proportions.
Front limbs can be short support/contact chains.

specs.animal_description: athletic medium-sized dog with a straight tail, alert ears, lean chest, and balanced working-dog proportions
specs.equipment_description: light symmetrical leather-and-brushed-steel adventuring armor on the chest, shoulders, and hips, with all leg joints unobstructed

specs.animal_description: sleek domestic cat with upright ears, long tail, compact paws, and flexible feline proportions
specs.equipment_description: none, visible natural fur and anatomy with simple markings

specs.animal_description: slim agile cat with upright ears, long tail, compact paws, and balanced feline proportions
specs.equipment_description: minimal symmetrical scout armor with a small chest harness, shoulder plates, and hip plates, leaving knees, elbows, ankles, and paws clear

specs.animal_description: stocky frog with wide-set eyes, broad body, short front legs, powerful folded rear legs, and webbed feet
specs.equipment_description: none, smooth natural skin with simple color patterning

specs.animal_description: stocky ram with curled horns, sturdy hooves, compact torso, and strong shoulders
specs.equipment_description: symmetrical fantasy plate barding over chest and flanks, with clean open gaps around knees, ankles, and hooves

specs.animal_description: rabbit with long upright ears, compact torso, small front paws, large rear feet, and a short tail
specs.equipment_description: none, soft simple fur silhouette with anatomy visible

specs.animal_description: low turtle with domed shell, short tail, sturdy head and neck, and four clearly visible walking legs
specs.equipment_description: none, natural shell plates simplified into readable broad shapes

specs.animal_description: slender deer with long legs, small hooves, narrow chest, short tail, and modest antlers
specs.equipment_description: none, natural coat with subtle markings and unobstructed joints
